description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden awning structure with a pitched roof and open sides, supported by sturdy posts at each corner. The roof is constructed from closely spaced wooden planks, with two rectangular skylights or vents on each side of the roof for ventilation or natural light. The side walls are partially enclosed, with the front and back featuring windows and a single door, suggesting a semi-sheltered space beneath. The interior framing is visible from the side views, showing a series of evenly spaced rafters supporting the roof. The wood appears to be untreated or lightly finished, giving the structure a natural, rustic appearance. This awning is suitable for use in parks, gardens, or communal urban spaces as a shelter or gathering area.
description: A large, pitched-roof wooden awning with open sides, visible rafters, and a partially enclosed base featuring windows and a door. The structure is freestanding and designed for shelter in outdoor urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pitched roof, central support posts, and the open sheltered area beneath the awning.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the interior rafters, two skylights, windows, and a door on the partially enclosed base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid wooden wall with two windows and the full width of the pitched roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the open rafter structure and skylights, mirroring the other side but without a door.
attribute_mounting_location: freestanding on flat ground or pavement
attribute_canopy_pattern: solid color wood planks with visible grain
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with posts and beams
